title: ochna elegans
intro: Ochna elegans, also known as the Bird's Egg Plant or Mickey Mouse Plant, is a small, deciduous shrub native to Africa and Madagascar, characterized by its glossy green leaves and fragrant white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ochna elegans include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
